The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may aid in managing conditions like arthritis and protecting against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Amphithalea orbiculata include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
